CustomField.description: Created by PwC as part of SC-685
CustomField.formula: OR( Item_Class__c = '3', Item_Class__c = '4', Item_Class__c = 'Q', Item_Class__c = 'A', Item_Class__c = '6', Item_Class__c = 'H', Item_Class__c = 'B', Item_Class__c = 'G' )
CustomField.label: Allowed on Aftermarket Quote
